creator: andreas@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Please look into the ports Makefile (NO_PACKAGE) 
There are technical reasons, why there isn't a FreeBSD package available. 
So please build apsfilter using the ports collection (make all install), 
it's easy as well .... And FreeBSD 2.2.5 comes with the option to 
automatically install the ports under /usr/ports ... you can find it 
there...
